title: dryopteris metteniana
intro: Dryopteris metteniana, also known as Metten's wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its various health benefits. The plant contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can help to relieve symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Traditional herbal preparations of Dryopteris metteniana include tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as bronchitis, pneumonia, and urinary tract infections.
